challenge: Deliver a complete narrative short as a near-solo effort, holding a consistent tone and visual language across every stage of production.
summary: An independent short film written, directed and edited by Rudeep Ramesh.
approach: Writing, directing and editing were handled personally, allowing a single unified vision to carry from the page through to the edit, with careful attention to pacing and mood.
results: A self-contained short film that demonstrates directorial and storytelling range beyond commercial work.
title: Aantharam
overview:
Trapped in a fragile reality, Jagan searches for himself in a world where his greatest loss never occurred, but the truth threatens to shatter his refuge. Can he find his way back to reality or will he lose himself forever?.
— a project exploring narrative filmmaking end-to-end, from script to final cut.
